title: Vision Rubric
description: JSON schema for Remote VLM screenshot evaluation responses.

widget_list.description: List of widgets identified in the layout.

visible_errors.description: Any visible errors (e.g. 404 text overlap, unrendered placeholders).

primary_cta_location.description: Description of where the primary Call To Action is located.

route_hint.description: Hint for navigation or routing expected.
